entries.license_note: FinBERT Apache-2.0; Haiku metered (Peder approval for scale)
entries.rationale: Only AV Social Sentiment feeds NLP today; no RavenPack / Bloomberg / FinGPT-style transformer pipeline. NLP sentiment via Vertex is embeddings-only, not a dedicated news sentiment model.

entries.license_note: Chronos-2 Apache-2.0; Moirai-MoE Apache-2.0; SageMaker metered (Peder approval)
entries.rationale: No time-series foundation models in use. FinGPT / TimesFM / Moirai / Chronos-2 all landed 2024-2026 and show zero-shot forecasting superior to classical ARIMA/GBM on many horizons. Phase-8 proposal on masterplan is the right home.

entries.license_note: SEC EDGAR public domain; QuiverQuant free tier for derived congressional trades
entries.rationale: sec_edgar covers Form 4 insider trades only. No 13F/13D (hedge-fund holdings), no QuiverQuant congressional trades, no WhaleWisdom-style aggregation. Missing ~80% of the institutional-filing alpha surface.

entries.license_note: FINRA bulk download free; public domain
entries.rationale: options_flow gives open-interest + IV skew via yfinance; no FINRA short-interest, no unusual-options-activity detection, no put/call imbalance signal.

entries.license_note: PRAW free + Reddit API ToS-OK; Stocktwits RSS free
entries.rationale: Zero coverage. WSB + Stocktwits are published free signal sources; X firehose is paid (deprioritise). Missing the 2021-style retail-squeeze signal entirely.

entries.license_note: SEC 10-Q public domain; Second Measure $10k+/yr requires approval
entries.rationale: No coverage. Second Measure / Earnest Analytics are expensive ($10k+/yr). Cheap proxy: company-filed 10-Q revenue deltas already in sec_edgar + yfinance -- not real-time but defensible.

entries.license_note: google_trends ToS non-commercial-grey; Wikimedia CC0 explicit
entries.integration_target: keep; add wikimedia as second signal
entries.rationale: google_trends via pytrends (archived) + 24h cache covers it; follow-up: add Wikipedia pageviews as second signal for ensemble robustness (Wikipedia has no 429 / ToS risk).

entries.license_note: FRED + Federal Reserve nowcasts public domain
entries.rationale: FRED covers macro time series well, but we do not ingest the NY Fed / Atlanta Fed GDPNow nowcasts (higher signal density during regime transitions).

entries.license_note: Orbital Insight / SpaceKnow paid; revisit at >$2M AUM
entries.rationale: No coverage. Orbital Insight / SpaceKnow are paid + pricey; ROI questionable at our capital scale. Defer until multi-million AUM.

entries.license_note: BQ public dataset; USPTO gov public domain
entries.rationale: Just replaced PatentsView with BQ public dataset; covers full US grants; free; low-latency enough for the signal.
